description: Correctness invariants for the knowledge base and chart engine. All app logic must respect these rules.

invariants.rule: The zodiac has exactly 12 rasis totalling 360Â°. Each rasi is 30Â°.
The zodiac has exactly 27 nakshatras totalling 360Â°. Each nakshatra is 13Â°20' (13.3333Â°).
Total padas = 108 (27 Ã— 4). Each pada = 3Â°20' (3.3333Â°).
Each rasi contains exactly 9 padas (2 full nakshatras + 1 partial + 1 partial that crosses a sign boundary).

Nakshatras spanning 2 signs: Krittika (Aries/Taurus), Mrigashira (Taurus/Gemini), Punarvasu (Gemini/Cancer), Uttara Phalguni (Leo/Virgo), Chitra (Virgo/Libra), Vishakha (Libra/Scorpio), Uttara Ashada (Sagittarius/Capricorn), Dhanishtha (Capricorn/Aquarius), Purva Bhadrapada (Aquarius/Pisces).
Vimshottari lord cycle is fixed: Ketu â†’ Venus â†’ Sun â†’ Moon â†’ Mars â†’ Rahu â†’ Jupiter â†’ Saturn â†’ Mercury. Repeats 3 times for 27 nakshatras.

Nakshatra lords by number: Ashwini-Ketu(1), Bharani-Venus(2), Krittika-Sun(3), Rohini-Moon(4), Mrigashira-Mars(5), Ardra-Rahu(6), Punarvasu-Jupiter(7), Pushya-Saturn(8), Ashlesha-Mercury(9), then repeat for next 9 and again for next 9.
Sign lordships are fixed: Sunâ†’Leo, Moonâ†’Cancer, Marsâ†’Aries+Scorpio, Mercuryâ†’Gemini+Virgo, Jupiterâ†’Sagittarius+Pisces, Venusâ†’Taurus+Libra, Saturnâ†’Capricorn+Aquarius.

Exaltation/debilitation pairs are always 180Â° (7th sign) apart: Sun Aries/Libra, Moon Taurus/Scorpio, Mars Capricorn/Cancer, Mercury Virgo/Pisces, Jupiter Cancer/Capricorn, Venus Pisces/Virgo, Saturn Libra/Aries.
Deep exaltation/debilitation degrees are symmetric: Sun 10Â°, Moon 3Â°, Mars 28Â°, Mercury 15Â°, Jupiter 5Â°, Venus 27Â°, Saturn 20Â°.
Rahu and Ketu are always 180Â° apart (same degree in opposite signs).
Universal aspect: all planets aspect their 7th. Additional: Marsâ†’4/7/8, Jupiterâ†’5/7/9, Saturnâ†’3/7/10.
Kendras are 1/4/7/10, Trikonas are 1/5/9. 1st house is both. A planet that lords both a Kendra and a Trikona (not just the 1st) is Yogakaraka.
Dusthanas are 6/8/12. Upachayas are 3/6/10/11. 6th is both.
Maraka houses are 2 and 7 (12th from Jeeva Shakti houses 3 and 8).
Badhaka rule by Lagna type: Movableâ†’11th, Fixedâ†’9th, Dualâ†’7th.
Navamsa starting signs by element: Fireâ†’Aries, Earthâ†’Capricorn, Airâ†’Libra, Waterâ†’Cancer. From the start, 9 consecutive signs form the 9 amsas.
Vargottama degree ranges: Movable signs 0Â°-3Â°20', Fixed signs 13Â°20'-16Â°40', Dual signs 26Â°40'-30Â°.
Combustion orbs (within Sun's sign): Moon 12Â°, Mars 17Â°, Mercury 14Â° (12Â° retrograde), Jupiter 11Â°, Venus 10Â° (8Â° retrograde), Saturn 15Â°.
Vimshottari Mahadasha starts from the lord of Janma Nakshatra (Moon's nakshatra at birth).
Nakshatra pada purushartha pattern is always Dharma/Artha/Kama/Moksha for padas 1/2/3/4 respectively, across all 27 nakshatras.
Sign purushartha pattern: Aries=Dharma, Taurus=Artha, Gemini=Kama, Cancer=Moksha, and repeats.
House purushartha pattern: Dharma=1/5/9, Artha=2/6/10, Kama=3/7/11, Moksha=4/8/12.
Panchadha Maitri combinations: F+F=AdhiMitra, N+F=Mitra, E+F=Sama, N+E=Satru, E+E=AdhiSatru.
Tatkalika Maitri: planets in houses 2/3/4/10/11/12 from each other are friends; 1/5/6/7/8/9 are enemies. No neutrals in temporal relationship.
Chara Karaka ranks by longitude: 1-Atmakaraka, 2-Amatyakaraka, 3-Bhratrikaraka, 4-Matrikaraka, 5-Pitrikaraka, 6-Putrakaraka, 7-Gnatikaraka, 8-Darakaraka.
Ayanamsa calculation: Sidereal longitude = Tropical longitude âˆ’ Ayanamsa. Jyotish is always sidereal (Nirayana).

Planetary nature: Waxing Moon + Mercury (alone/with benefics) + Jupiter + Venus are natural benefics. Sun, Mars, Saturn, Waning Moon, Rahu, Ketu are natural malefics. Mercury with malefics becomes malefic.
Dig Bala: 1st house = Mercury+Jupiter strong, Saturn weak. 4th = Moon+Venus strong, Sun+Mars weak. 7th = Saturn strong, Jupiter+Mercury weak. 10th = Sun+Mars strong, Moon+Venus weak.

Yogakaraka table (must match exactly): Taurusâ†’Saturn(9+10), Cancerâ†’Mars(5+10), Leoâ†’Mars(4+9), Libraâ†’Saturn(4+5), Capricornâ†’Venus(5+10), Aquariusâ†’Venus(4+9). Other Lagnas do NOT have a single Yogakaraka.

computed_checks: Every nakshatra lord cycles through the 9-lord Vimshottari sequence 3 times
Every Vargottama degree band matches V-18
Every Yogakaraka chart lord ownership matches V-30
